pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 8 to Java 17 to enable compilation for the new runtime.
Upgrade Spring Framework to version 6.1.2, which requires Java 17 and Jakarta EE namespaces.
Upgrade Jetty to version 11.0.19, which supports Jakarta Servlet API 5.0+.
Upgrade Tomcat to version 10.1.17, which implements Jakarta Servlet API 6.0.
Upgrade Undertow to version 2.3.10.Final, which supports Jakarta Servlet API 6.0.
Upgrade Mockito to version 5.8.0, which requires Java 11+ and uses Byte Buddy compatible with Java 17.
Upgrade JUnit Jupiter to version 5.10.0 to ensure compatibility with modern test runners and Java 17.
Upgrade Jackson to version 2.16.1 to maintain security and compatibility with newer Java features.
Upgrade Byte Buddy to version 1.14.11 to support instrumentation on Java 17.
Upgrade SLF4J to version 2.0.9 to align with Logback 1.4+ and modern logging APIs.
Upgrade Logback to version 1.4.14 to support SLF4J 2.0 and Java 17.
Replace javax.servlet-api with jakarta.servlet-api 6.0.0 to comply with Jakarta EE 10 namespace changes.
Replace javax.validation-api with jakarta.validation-api 3.0.2 to comply with Jakarta EE 10 namespace changes.
Add jakarta.annotation-api 2.1.1 to replace javax.annotation-api for Jakarta EE 10 compliance.
Change project packaging from 'jar' to 'pom' and add modules to support a multi-module Maven structure.
Upgrade JUnit Platform to version 1.10.0 to match JUnit Jupiter 5.10.0.
Upgrade Swagger Annotations to version 1.6.12 for API documentation compatibility.
Add Google Truth 0.41 as a testing assertion library.
Add jackson-datatype-jsr310 to support Java 8 Date/Time API serialization with Jackson.
Add jackson-databind-nullable to support OpenAPI generator nullable fields.
Upgrade OWASP Dependency Check plugin to version 9.0.7 for improved security scanning.
Upgrade OpenAPI Generator plugin to version 6.5.0 for modern code generation.
Upgrade Maven Compiler Plugin to version 3.12.1 for better Java 17 support.
Upgrade Maven Surefire Plugin to version 3.2.3 for modern test execution.
Upgrade JaCoCo Maven Plugin to version 0.8.11 for code coverage reporting.
Upgrade Nexus Staging Maven Plugin to version 1.6.13 for deployment management.
Upgrade Maven Source Plugin to version 3.3.0 for source jar generation.
Upgrade Maven Javadoc Plugin to version 3.6.3 for documentation generation.
Upgrade Maven Release Plugin to version 3.0.1 for release management.
Upgrade Maven GPG Plugin to version 3.1.0 for artifact signing.
Upgrade Maven Dependency Plugin to version 3.6.1 for dependency analysis.
Move dependencies and plugins into dependencyManagement and pluginManagement sections for multi-module consistency.
Add a 'develop' profile that is active by default and includes example modules.
Remove legacy Jackson ASL dependencies (jackson-core-asl, jackson-mapper-asl) in favor of modern Jackson 2.x.
Remove Joda-Time dependency as Java 8 Date/Time API is now preferred.
Remove Springfox dependency as it is deprecated and incompatible with Spring 6.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add IntelliJ IDEA configuration directory to gitignore to prevent IDE-specific files from being tracked.

README.md.general_idea: Rewrite README to reflect the shift from JUnit 4 Rules to JUnit 5 Extensions and modular artifact structure.
README.md.human_impl: Replace `@Rule` and `RestServiceRule` examples with `@ExtendWith(MockitoSpringEndpointExtension.class)` and `@MockEndpoint` annotations.

README.md.general_idea: Update dependency snippets to show the new modular artifact IDs for JUnit 5 and JUnit 4.
Update the history section to document the new 1.0.3 and 1.1.0 releases.
README.md.human_impl: Add entries for 1.1.0 and 1.0.3, updating the release link to point to 1.0.3.
